title: Jacksonville Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Jacksonville, with a Z-Score of +3.60. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level.
body:
The current heat wave in Jacksonville has resulted in a significant increase in Cooling Degree Days (CDD), with a value of 11.6 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 43%, while the wind speed is moderate at 13.4 km/h. 
 The lack of Heating Degree Days (HDD) indicates that the city is experiencing extremely hot conditions, with no need for heating.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
